emails.subject: Re: Click Paper Approvals, 05-08-2001
emails.body: Jane, We have a Japanese counterparty on this list that wants to trade physical financial pulp paper. Any problems? Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 05/10/2001 05:07 PM Amber Ebow 05/10/2001 02:48 PM

emails.subject: Re: Click Paper Approvals, 05-08-2001
emails.body: Tana, No probs. They are listed on the first section of the Tokyo Stock Exchange and are the second largest paper company here. Jane McBride Senior Legal Counsel Enron Japan Corp.
